holdings.n: iShares Broad USD High Yield Corporate Bond ETF

overview.description: The Kensington Credit Opportunities ETF (KAMO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that broadly invests in high-yielding debt securities of any maturity. The fund optimizes the portfolio to balance performance and risks. KAMO was launched on Dec 17, 2025 and is issued by Kensington.
